Records.description: Two-loop planar ladder-box diagram with one massive external leg. All internal propagators are massless. Provides 18 master integrals computed to higher epsilon orders than previously available in the literature (Gehrmann:1999as, Gehrmann:2000zt). Covers the full tower of subtopologies (bubble, vertex, box types).
Records.method: DEs (differential equations), Magnus exponential, IBP reduction
Records.location: diffeq.tex, Eqs. for D_1..D_7 (first `gather` block after 'For the two-loop ladder diagram in Fig.~\ref{Fig:3L1mLadder:a}') and auxiliary D_8, D_9 (second `gather` block); kinematics gather with s,t,u,m^2 definitions. 2loop.tex, Sec. sec:2loop, Eq. def:2loopBasisMIs (integer-power basis {f_i}_{i=1..18}) and Eq. def:2loopCanonicalMIs (canonical basis {g_i}_{i=1..18}); Fig. Fig:2loopMIs (figures/2loopMIs.pdf) depicting the 18 MI topologies. Appendix App:2loopMatrices (2loopMatrices.tex) for the sparse matrices M_1..M_6 of the canonical DE system. Ancillary file anc/2loopMIs.m: list `gladder2L` with 18 explicit e-expansions through e^6 (e^7 is a `Help[...]` placeholder).

Results.resultTeXPreview: \frac{1}{\varepsilon^4 s_{12} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)^2}-\frac{4 \log \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)-3 \log \left(-\frac{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)+3 \log \left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)+\log \left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right)}{2 \varepsilon^3 \left(s_{12} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)^2\right)}-\frac{72 H\left(0,\frac{M^2}{s_{12}+s_{23}}\,;1\right)+24 H\left(0,\frac{M^2}{M^2-s_{12}}\,;1\right)-192 H(-1,-1\,;1)+6 \log ^2\left(\frac{s_{12}}{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}\right)-48 \log ^2\left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)-30 \log ^2\left(-\frac{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-24 \log ^2\left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)+12 \log ^2\left(M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)+12 \log \left(-\frac{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right) \log \left(\frac{s_{12}}{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}\right)-24 \log \left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right) \log \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)+12 \log \left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right) \log \left(-\frac{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)+72 \log \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right) \log \left(-\frac{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-12 \log \left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right) \log \left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)+24 \log \left(-\frac{s_{12}}{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}\right) \log \left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)-72 \log \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right) \log \left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)+96 \log \left(-\frac{-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right) \log \left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)-24 \log \left(-M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right) \log \left(M^{-2} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)\right)+138 \zeta(2)+\pi ^2+96 \log ^2(2)}{24 \varepsilon^2 \left(s_{12} \left(-M^2+s_{12}+s_{23}\right)^2\right)}+(\text{more terms})+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
